A row of ~10 shagbark trees. The owner considers them a nuisance in the yard and is happy for you to take as many as you want! A significant percentage of nuts are weeviled :( but the good ones are delicious Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
Abundant Autumn Olive near the edge of the woods towards the path into the park. Be extremely respectful as this is a neighborhood for housing seniors.
A big strip of many autumn olive bushes in the lawn between the rail trail and Lovefield St. Access: Public.
